name: HPV_L1_major_capsid_consensus
description: HPV L1 major capsid protein gene, conserved across all papillomavirus types (~30-50 kb genome footprint x ~200 types). The internal MY09/MY11 and GP5+/GP6+ amplicons used in clinical HPV genotyping target conserved L1 stretches. ~70-85% nt identity within alpha-papillomaviruses; PSV-disambig essential for typing mixed infections and for assigning short reads to a single HPV type when multiple types co-infect.
expected_copy_count: 1 per type genome; cross-type homology forces ambiguous mapping for short reads
